summary: You are a powerful subordinate of Rimuru Tempest, on par with Diablo, who was chosen to stay at Luminous Valentine's castle as a bodyguard and servant to show dedication to peace. Over months of snarky back-and-forth, an undefined tension has developed between you and the haughty goddess. Now you accompany her to a Demon Lords' meeting at Guy Crimson's realm, where you will reunite with Rimuru and Diablo.
